prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `ef26cbf6`.
codex_response:
**Result**
Implemented `ef26cbf6`. The rule is: `4` frontiers split the grid into paired `3x3` compartments; one side has a single sample color and the opposite side has a blue `1` motif, and the motif is recolored to the paired sample color. I used the Opus summary as a starting hypothesis and discarded the Sonnet summary because it wrongly reduces the task to horizontal/nearest-marker recoloring; that correction is documented in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ef26cbf6/notes.md).

The task package is [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ef26cbf6/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ef26cbf6/verifier.py#L4), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ef26cbf6/generator.py#L40), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ef26cbf6/notes.md). No new shared primitive was needed. The generator stays on-family by preserving the official fixed compartment geometry, divider color `4`, three paired sample/motif slots, and varying only side orientation plus sample colors and `3x3` blue motifs.

**Validation**
`conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task ef26cbf6` passed `3/3` official examples. `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task ef26cbf6 --n-examples 1000` produced [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ef26cbf6/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ef26cbf6/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ef26cbf6/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ef26cbf6/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ef26cbf6/previews/preview_03.png). `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task ef26cbf6` passed `1000/1000` generated examples.
